coverage_rules.description: Office visits covered at 80% after deductible

full_text:
Gulf Health Insurance - Standard Health Plan 2018

Section 1: Coverage
This plan covers medically necessary services including office visits, laboratory tests, and hospitalization. Office visits (CPT 99213, 99214) are covered at 80% after the annual deductible of SAR 500. Laboratory work including CBC (85025), metabolic panel (80053), and venipuncture (36415) are covered at 90%.

Section 2: Exclusions
The following are excluded from coverage: cosmetic surgery, experimental treatments, services not medically necessary, pre-existing conditions during the first 6 months.

Section 3: Benefit Limits
Annual maximum benefit: SAR 500,000. Per-incident maximum: SAR 100,000. Office visit annual limit: SAR 50,000.
full_text_ar:
تأمين الخليج الصحي - خطة التأمين الصحي القياسية 2018

القسم 1: التغطية
تغطي هذه الخطة الخدمات الطبية اللازمة بما في ذلك زيارات العيادة والفحوصات المخبرية والاستشفاء.
